_readme: Antigravity → Chats → MCP Servers → Manage MCP Servers → View Raw Config → paste mcpServers block
Claude Code  → run: claude mcp add-json <name> --scope user '<json>'
--scope user = global (all projects). Manual: edit ~/.claude.json in your home folder.
Cursor       → copy to .cursor/mcp.json in your project root
1. Supabase token  → supabase.com → Account → Access Tokens → Generate new token
2. GitHub token    → github.com/settings/tokens → Generate new token (classic)
Copy this file to mcp.json, fill in your tokens, then paste into your AI tool.
mcp.json is gitignored — your tokens will never be committed.
